home.subtitle: News, listings and chat in one place.
home.unites: We bring people together around what matters: timely news, clear listings, and real conversation. One space in many languages—on the web and in the app—for those who value genuine connection without the noise.
home.googleSearchHint: For Google Search: verify the site in Search Console (NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_SITE_VERIFICATION) and submit sitemap.xml — see .env.example.

site.aboutHeadline: <brand></brand><tail> — your local corner of the internet.</tail>
site.introBody: brings together community news, classifieds, services, jobs, and a public chat. Pick your language, use it in the browser, and add it to your home screen for quick access—same account on mobile where supported.
site.fChat: Chat with others and comment on posts
site.note: New accounts confirm their email with a one-time code—this helps keep the space safer for everyone.
site.privacyPageDescription: How ARCHI collects, uses, and stores your personal data when you use the service.
site.termsPageDescription: Rules for using the ARCHI service, accounts, content, and liability.

auth.name: Name or nickname
auth.nameHint: Others will see this in chat, comments, and listings.
auth.devHintSms: After registration, a verification code is sent by email (Resend or SMTP in .env). Without that, the code may appear on screen in development.
auth.checkSms: Check your email for the verification code.
auth.codesShownBelow: Code is shown below (development or when email is not configured).
auth.verifyPhoneOnlyHint: Enter the 6-digit code from the email we sent.
auth.needVerification: Confirm your account first (code from email).
auth.unexpectedLoginResponse: Invalid server response. Try again or refresh the page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoTranslateHint: Uses browser translation for content where supported.
settings.uiThemeHint: Switch anytime. “Zone” adds scanlines and a stylized heading font.
settings.geoUnavailable: Geolocation is not available in this browser.
settings.blockUserHint: You will not see posts, comments, chat messages, listings, or jobs from people you block. They are not notified.
settings.blockUserVerifyFirst: Confirm your account (email verification code) to use blocking.

news.title: News
news.videoUrlHint: YouTube or a direct link to .mp4 / .webm
news.reportVideoLogin: Log in to report this video
news.reportVideoPlaceholder: What is wrong with this video?
news.reportVideoFailed: Could not send the report. Try again later.

listing.title: Listings
listing.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This cannot be undone.

chat.title: Chat
chat.placeholder: Message, caption, or paste a link (https://)…
chat.composerHint: Send text, paste a web or YouTube link, or attach a photo, short video, or music/audio file.

common.moderationBlocked: This content violates community rules (violence, hate, drugs, sexual material, or threats) and cannot be published.
